title: neottia unguiculata
intro: Neottia unguiculata, also known as the yellow bird's nest orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its distinctive yellow flowers and unique growth habit. Traditionally, Neottia unguiculata has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Neottia unguiculata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or extract, and has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of conditions.
